about.title: Our Heritage
about.subtitle: Transforming craft into distinction since 2021.
about.origins: Born in 2021 as a visual narrative of pure craftsmanship, E1000 Leather has evolved into a sanctuary of bespoke artisanship and uncompromising quality.
about.philosophy: Every piece is sculpted from the most exceptional full-grain hides, tailored intimately to the vision of our clients. To be the finest is not merely our ambition; it is the very ethos of our atelier.
about.customer: True luxury lies in absolute reverence for the individual. You are beautifully distinct, and our life's work is to translate that individuality into timeless art.
about.vision: Rooted in the heart of Baku, our atelier is now carrying this local heritage of fine artisanship onto the global stage.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Join the archive for exclusive releases and artisanal insights.

grades.title: Material Standards
grades.description: Our commitment to craftsmanship begins with the hide. Explore the rigorous grading system that defines every piece we create, from the raw texture of Heritage to the refined finish of our Studio selections.
grades.hierarchy: The hierarchy of our raw materials.
grades.quote: "Every hide possesses a fundamental truth. Our grading system does not judge quality—it classifies character. We orchestrate the relationship between raw nature and the final artifact."
grades.process_desc: We utilize vegetable tanning—a traditional 40-day process using natural bark extracts. This artisanal method respects the material and the environment.
grades.ethics_desc: Every hide is a byproduct of the local food industry, sourced exclusively from certified ethical farms within a 200-mile radius of our atelier.
grades.care_desc: Leather is a living material. We recommend treating our Grade I and II pieces with our organic beeswax balm every six months to maintain hydration.

checkout.title: Delivery Details
checkout.country_warning: Based on your selected country, taxes and shipping costs may vary. The final amount will be recalculated.

validation.required_address: Delivery address is obligatory for dispatch.
validation.required_phone: Contact number is necessary for concierge coordination.
validation.invalid_phone: Please provide a valid contact format.
validation.required_city: City is required to estimate accurate shipping logistics.
validation.postal_code_invalid: Postal code must be left blank for Azerbaijan, and is mandatory for other countries.
